188 _52ED TISUE_TYPE_DSCHRG_CD (52Ed) Tissue Type: Discharge CHAR 2 A code that indicates the type of tissue that occupies the majority of the ulcer bed of the largest pressure ulcer at the time of discharge. 00 = Closed/resurfaced: The wound is completely covered with epithelium (new skin), 01 = Epithelial tissue: For superficial ulcers, new pink or shiny tissue (skin) that grows in from the edges or as islands on the ulcer surface. 02 = Granulation tissue: Pink or beefy red
